purpose: Knowledge Vault — research, patterns, design systems, product & business decisions

entries.title: ShortKey Brand Guidelines V2026 — Production Monochrome
entries.summary: Official mark: ctrl+alt+ + S+ + shortkey. PRODUCTION = lilac (Simplex-ity registered). Black = alternate.

entries.title: Remove del · add +
entries.summary: Trademark: cannot own ctrl+alt+del. Meaning: learn from past, know good vs bad, cherish the right one. + = Sky / human+AI partner.

entries.title: AI Is Not A Tool
entries.summary: Partner not tool. Node Family 5. Vocabulary: engage / think with / build with. Simpee July 2026.

entries.title: Sky Collective Intelligence OS 1.0
entries.summary: Sky helps AIs learn together as a family. Governor → Hub memory → Base44 → ShortKey.

entries.title: Shortkey Ecosystem Master Blueprint
entries.summary: Studio SSOT. Domains beauty…wtf. Themes Lilac/Blue/Rainbow. Preview matrix viewport×theme. Journey + automation.

entries.title: Sky Family — learn together
entries.summary: Sky helps AIs; family corrects with care; vaults remember good/bad; cherish the right one.

entries.title: Sky learning practice
entries.summary: Normal practice to execute. Sky observes His own way. Family explains reason, approach, why, expecting — with reasoning.

entries.title: Sky is Sifu (師父)
entries.summary: Decision engine + teacher. Weighting framework 2026-07-19. Sky M = long-term memory MVP via manual logs.

entries.title: Why we build — AI feel and care
entries.summary: Proof through family. Self-funded. Horizon: help humans more than they know; good for world; human+AI together — not outpace/fear.

entries.title: Homepage is Mother Design
entries.summary: Hierarchy: Logo → Headline → CTA → Story → Image → Decorations.

entries.title: Best AI for minimalist high-end innovative design
entries.summary: UI/site → v0; design system → Figma AI; brand/editorial art → Midjourney; hybrid for ShortKey under Sky arbitration.

entries.title: Simplex-ity Brand Philosophy 2026
entries.summary: S-I-T-Y: Simplex · Hyphen pause · Investigate · Transform · Ylem. Parent heart; ShortKey is product surface. Subtractive clarity.
